semantic.role: Defines the canonical structure and validation rules for SpineRule documents, which encode actionable policies within the ArchSpine mirror orchestration system.
responsibilities: Rule validation against a fixed JSON Schema to guarantee syntactic correctness
Enforcement of required metadata (ruleId, title, summary, severity, etc.)
Classification of rule severity and enforceability for downstream processing
Pattern-based constraint on rule identifiers to ensure naming consistency
invariants: All SpineRule documents must include the following mandatory fields: schemaVersion, ruleId, title, summary, appliesTo, severity, enforceable, bodyMarkdown
The ruleId field must match the pattern ^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$ (lowercase, hyphen-separated, no leading/trailing hyphens)
severity must be one of the enum values: advisory, warning, error
appliesTo must be a non-empty array of non-empty strings
No additional properties beyond those defined in the schema are permitted
The bodyMarkdown field must contain non-empty Markdown-formatted rule body text

English.role: Defines the canonical structure and validation rules for SpineRule documents, which encode actionable policies within the ArchSpine mirror orchestration system.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Version identifier for the schema; ensures compatibility with the consuming parser.
parameter_definitions.ruleId: Unique identifier for the rule; must be lowercase with hyphens. Used for referencing and update operations.
parameter_definitions.title: Human-readable short name of the rule; required to provide quick context.
parameter_definitions.summary: One-line description clarifying the rule's intent and scope.
parameter_definitions.appliesTo: List of subsystem names or component identifiers that the rule targets; must contain at least one valid entry.
parameter_definitions.severity: Determines the rule's criticality: 'advisory' for recommendations, 'warning' for potential issues, 'error' for strict violations.
parameter_definitions.enforceable: Boolean flag indicating whether the rule can be automatically enforced or is informational only.
parameter_definitions.rationale: Optional justification text explaining why the rule exists; may be null.
parameter_definitions.bodyMarkdown: Detailed rule body in Markdown format; non-empty content expected for actionable interpretation.

English.stability_and_risks: This schema enforces structural integrity across all SpineRule documents. Violations (e.g., missing mandatory fields or pattern mismatches) cause immediate parsing failure, preventing inconsistent or ambiguous rules from being applied. Risk: over-constraining rule authors may discourage flexible policy expressions, but the trade-off ensures deterministic enforcement across distributed mirror nodes.

Simplified Chinese.role: 定义 SpineRule 文档的标准结构和验证规则，这些文档编码 ArchSpine 镜像编排系统中的可执行策略。

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 架构版本标识符，确保与解析器的兼容性。
parameter_definitions.ruleId: 规则的唯一标识符，必须为小写字母加连字符。用于引用和更新操作。
parameter_definitions.title: 规则的人类可读短名称，必须提供以快速提供上下文。
parameter_definitions.summary: 规则意图和作用范围的一行描述。
parameter_definitions.appliesTo: 规则所适用的子系统名称或组件标识符列表，至少包含一个有效条目。
parameter_definitions.severity: 决定规则的严重级别：'advisory' 表示建议，'warning' 表示潜在问题，'error' 表示严格违规。
parameter_definitions.enforceable: 布尔标志，指示规则是否可以自动执行，还是仅提供信息。
parameter_definitions.rationale: 可选的规则理由文本，解释规则存在的原因；可以为 null。
parameter_definitions.bodyMarkdown: 规则的详细内容（Markdown 格式），非空内容以确保可操作的解释。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 该架构确保所有 SpineRule 文档的结构完整性。违反规则（如缺少必填字段或模式不匹配）会导致立即解析失败，防止不一致或模糊的规则被应用。风险：过度约束可能限制规则作者的灵活表达，但此权衡确保了分布式镜像节点间的确定性执行。
